title: Customize My Work Section
excerpt:
Hello. 
In the My Work section, I can currently see the following columns 

Item
Board
Group

Date
Status

In our templates, we also have an Estimated Time column, and I would like to show it in the My Work section…

posts.author: MurtazaTalib (Murtaza Talib)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

In the My Work section, I can currently see the following columns

  • Item
  • Board
  • Group
  • People
  • Date
  • Status

In our templates, we also have an Estimated Time column, and I would like to show it in the My Work section so that people can see how much time is booked for their tasks on a daily basis. How can I customize the view to show this column.

Thank you.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @MurtazaTalib ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately, currently MyWork only supports the columns that you indicated.

If you want to see how much time has been scheduled for everyone, I would suggest trying to use the Workload widget, which shows exactly what you are looking for, albeit it cannot be used in My Work.

You can learn more about the Workload Widget here.

Let me know if this helps!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
